creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to dasti from comment #1)
Until yesterday I was running a UFS2 based SAMBA 4.6.6 standalone FS on FreeBSD 11.1 Prerelease i386, and SAMBA 4.5.12 AD on FreeBSD 11.1 Prerelease amd64

Today, I'm running SAMBA 4.6.6 on Standalone and an AD, both on UFS2.

There doesn't appear to be any "bug" to test.  Perhaps you could paste the actuall ACL errors that you're experiencing?
